description: Malaysian OSAT through subsidiary Carsem (M) Sdn Bhd. Full turnkey solutions for leaded and leadless semiconductor packaging and test. Carsem has 500+ testers and handlers across 125,000 sq ft of dedicated test and wafer probe area. Operations in Ipoh (2 plants) and Suzhou, China. Part of Hong Leong Group. Market cap ~6.7B MYR.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing and dicing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: Bursa Malaysia listed. Carsem subsidiary founded 1972. 500+ testers, dedicated wafer probe area. Accretech Malaysia has offices near Carsem's facilities.

_metadata.dataSource: MPI IR, Carsem website, Bursa Malaysia, industry research
